goals.title: WU-1 notes.md output structure and citation deeplinks
goals.objective: Implement notes.md as the user-facing deliverable with 4 bullet sections (핵심 테이크어웨이 3-5 lines / 큰 흐름 narrative bullets / 개념 및 주요 이론 정리 / 세부 내용 per-slide heading+image+utterance-proportional bullets). Concept and detail bullets MUST carry a citation deeplink: `transcript.md#t<id>` plus a parenthetical `https://youtu.be/<VID>?t=<sec>` whose seconds match the anchor timestamp within ±1s. 핵심 테이크어웨이 and 큰 흐름 are narrative and citation-exempt. Add transcript.md per-cue anchors using the unique-id scheme `t<HHMMSS>` with `-2/-3` suffixes for duplicate timestamps. Add focused tests for rendering, anchor uniqueness, and citation link shape. Covers AC-1..AC-6, AC-8. Commit as WU-1.
goals.evidence: WU-1 completed in commit 1c182e5: notes.md 7-section skeleton renderer (한눈에 요약/목차/강의 흐름/핵심 개념·이론/상세 노트/복습 질문/정리 커버리지), unique transcript cue anchors t<HHMMSS>[-n], citation deeplinks (transcript.md#t + youtu.be ?t=) on concept/detail/question bullets with anchor-validity invariant, citation-exempt takeaway/toc/flow; focused tests 19 passed; architect CLEAR/APPROVE, executor QA passed.

goals.title: WU-2 deterministic core skeleton and grounding
goals.objective: Make the deterministic core (LLM 0) emit notes.md as skeleton + grounding only: section headings + per-slide image/time + verbatim transcript bullets (with anchors) + `<!-- 미보강 -->` marker, with NO mechanical prose summary. Replace summary.md/outline.md generation paths. Keep synthesis_input.json as the enrichment input (text only). Preserve lazy imports. Add focused tests proving skeleton shape, grounding bullets, marker presence, and no fabricated prose. Covers AC-7, AC-9, AC-10. Commit as WU-2.
goals.evidence: WU-2 complete in commit 7b1f92b: deterministic token-0 core emits notes.md only (7-section skeleton+grounding); removed render_summary_md/render_outline_md/_excerpt; migrated coverage/completeness_hook/runstate/cli + perf_smoke + dependent tests to the notes artifact contract (notes_path/notes_nonempty); reconciled README.md + docs/synthesis_contract.md to the notes.md model. Covers AC-7, AC-9, AC-10.

goals.objective: Create `skills/lectural/references/summary_prompt.md` as the single-source enrichment prompt: role + reference material (synthesis_input.json) placed before instructions + XML-tagged sections + output contract (4 sections in order, markdown only) + few-shot example (skeleton -> enriched) + Chain-of-Density + per-slide utterance-proportional detail + grounding/'불명확' rule + mandatory citation rule. Reference it from `skills/lectural/SKILL.md` and keep `.claude/skills/lectural/SKILL.md` body parity; wire skill-driven auto-enrichment of notes.md prose preserving anchors. Covers AC-11..AC-14. Commit as WU-3.
goals.evidence: WU-3 complete in commit 7b1c6a5: single-source enrichment prompt skills/lectural/references/summary_prompt.md (role/reference-first/XML/7-section output contract/few-shot/Chain-of-Density/soft heuristic/불명확 grounding/mandatory citation) in both skill trees; SKILL.md (both trees, zero-Hangul, NOTES_* symbolic) references it + notes.md auto-enrichment; pipeline.md + AGENTS.md migrated; packaging test ANCHOR_SYMBOLS moved to nine NOTES_* constants. goals.title: WU-4 coverage and completeness hook to notes contract
goals.objective: Update `lectural/coverage.py` and `scripts/completeness_hook.py` to the notes.md contract: verify 4 sections, image+bullets per slide, full citation enforcement (every concept/detail bullet has `transcript.md#t<id>` whose anchor exists in transcript.md AND a youtu.be ?t= whose seconds match ±1s), 핵심 테이크어웨이 3-5 lines and 큰 흐름 >=2 bullets structural checks (citation-exempt, no exact-prose). Add `NOTES_CONTRACT_VERSION` and make the hook fail-closed on contract import failure (remove legacy literal fallback). Stop hook blocks if `<!-- 미보강 -->` remains; CLI exit code does not check the marker. Apply grep-gate deletion of stale summary.md/outline.md/anchor references across code/hook/tests/docs/skills. Covers AC-15..AC-18, plus stale cleanup. Commit as WU-4.
goals.evidence: WU-4 complete in commit 72e6d00: added import-safe lectural/notes_contract.py with NOTES_CONTRACT_VERSION and shared validators; coverage.py folds marker-agnostic notes_contract into overall_pass (bare skeleton exits 0); completeness_hook.py imports contract fail-closed and enforces full Layer-2 notes contract (미보강 blocks, seven sections, per-heading bullet, per-non-intro-slide image, citation validity). Removed legacy summary/outline anchor constants from synthesis.py, added structural NOTES_INTRO_MARKER for synthetic frameless intro exemption, and updated live AC docs. Full suite 227 passed; final architect 20-WU4ArchFinal2 CLEAR/APPROVE; final executor QA 21-WU4QAFinal2 passed. Covers AC-15..AC-18.

goals.title: WU-5 lectural doctor and distribution
goals.objective: Add `lectural doctor` command validating the full component manifest (python core + [run] deps with import+version / ffmpeg + yt-dlp / agent-side files SKILL+hooks+summary_prompt+AGENTS / plugin registration) with per-item status enum (ok/missing/incompatible/unfixable), overall exit-code map (0 ready / 2 user-action / 1 internal), and `--fix` safe idempotent autoinstall (yt-dlp via `uv tool install`, ffmpeg via OS package manager best-effort, one-line fallback on failure; bounded <=2 passes, stop on unfixable, no infinite loop). Update distribution: Claude plugin (/plugin) + Codex AGENTS + agent-driven uvx runtime; agent calls `lectural doctor --fix` before first run. Update README to a two-part honest install (agent-side plugin/AGENTS + uv/uvx runtime + ffmpeg external) keeping plugin-first. Covers AC-22..AC-28. Commit as WU-5.
goals.evidence: WU-5 complete in commit cd8f41b: added lectural doctor [--fix] [--json] validating python core+[run] deps with import/version/provider, ffmpeg/yt-dlp, agent files, semantic hooks manifest, plugin registration, and mirror parity; status enum ok/missing/incompatible/unfixable; exit map 0/2/1; bounded safe --fix. Added setuptools>=68,<81 to [run] for webrtcvad/pkg_resources; doctor in --extra run env exits 0 ready. README/AGENTS/SKILL/pipeline updated for plugin-first two-part install and doctor-before-run.
